direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. use duberymnl fonts logo and product.
- High-concept editorial campaign shot: stylized wide/chunky DuberyMNL wordmark overlay centered in the composition ("DUBERY" in place of "DO&GO"), male model seated behind an oversized checkerboard chessboard in a quirky playful pose with one hand mid-move on a giant chess piece, shot from a low angle with forced perspective so the foreground hand and chess piece read huge; bright sunny sky + clouds in the background with a pop-color wall element, pink fur statement coat, mustache, DuberyMNL product swapped in.
- Defaulting to a Filipino male in his late 20s with short wavy dark hair + mustache to match the reference attitude, wearing the pink statement coat, seated at the chess table, sunglasses pushed high on the face, hand mid-move on a pawn. I'll mirror the sky/cloud backdrop + accent wall for editorial pop.
- DuberyMNL wordmark applied as a clean white overlay across the mid-frame (reads as a fashion-campaign title), product tack-sharp with DUBERY branding readable on the temple, lenses reflecting the sky/outdoor scene correctly since this is an outdoor-feeling set. 4:5 crop.

Hit Generate when ready.
